description: Implementation contracts for Zhimengji v1.2 — all P0 and P1 features
editorialNotes: IPC commands use snake_case on Rust side, auto-transformed to camelCase by serde. All IPC params are passed as named objects. Frontend status is optimistic: local state updates instantly, SyncManager handles persistence.

WorldObject.description: Core entity — replaces old story_nodes, setting_cards, narrative_units

name.description: Object display name, unique per project

gradient.description: CSS gradient colors for book card

SaveStatus.description: Cross-cutting save state visible in StatusBar

contracts.title: Reliable API sync with retry queue
contracts.description: Replace fire-and-forget api.* calls with SyncManager that maintains a persistent retry queue (IndexedDB). Every write operation goes through enqueue() before reaching Tauri invoke. 3-retry exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s). Failed operations remain in queue for manual retry.

writeOperation: User action triggers optimistic local state update
SyncManager.enqueue() adds operation to IndexedDB queue
SyncManager processes queue: invoke Tauri API
On success: remove from queue, update saveStatus='saved'
On failure: increment retryCount, schedule retry (exponential backoff)
After 3 failures: mark as failed, update saveStatus='error', keep in queue
User can click retry button to re-process failed operations

acceptance: Disconnect backend → edit object → content saved locally → reconnect → content synced automatically
3 consecutive failures shows persistent error indicator with retry button
Restart app with pending queue → queue reloaded from IndexedDB → retry on next ping success

contracts.title: Offline detection and handling
contracts.description: Frontend pings Tauri `ping` command every 3 seconds. On failure: enter offline mode (yellow banner, queue edits locally). On recovery within 5 seconds: replay queue and dismiss banner.

offlineDetection: invoke rejects → set isOnline=false, emit offline event
UI shows yellow banner: '数据暂存本地，正在尝试连接…'
invoke succeeds → set isOnline=true, process pending queue
Dismiss banner within 5 seconds of recovery

acceptance: Backend stop → within 3 seconds frontend shows offline banner
Offline editing preserves all changes in queue
Backend restart → within 5 seconds queue replayed, banner dismissed

contracts.title: Version history / global undo
contracts.description: App-level Changelog in App.tsx memory. Undo stack for object create/delete, canvas position changes, connection create/delete. Auto-named snapshot per session. Not persisted across restarts (v1.2 boundary).

undo: App restores object state from entry.snapshot
redo: Changelog.redo() returns most recent undone entry

errorReturns.empty_stack: no-op, visual indicator that undo is unavailable

acceptance: Delete object → Ctrl+Z restores it
Drag canvas node → Ctrl+Z returns to previous position
Close and reopen app → undo history is empty (memory-only)

contracts.title: Canvas state sync with debounce and version stamp
contracts.description: 500ms debounce on canvas save. Version stamp on each snapshot. Backend validates incoming version vs stored version. Reject if backend version is newer. Drag-end triggers one save, not per-pixel.

errors: VERSION_CONFLICT: backend version X > incoming version Y

canvasSave: User drags node → positions update in memory
If another drag within 500ms → reset timer
Timer fires → generate version stamp (current timestamp ms)
Backend validates: storedVersion <= incomingVersion → accept, update storedVersion
Backend validates: storedVersion > incomingVersion → reject, return VERSION_CONFLICT
On conflict: show toast, reload canvas state from backend

errorReturns.VERSION_CONFLICT: show conflict toast, reload canvas state from backend
errorReturns.save_failure: queue retained, retry with exponential backoff

acceptance: Continuous drag for 30 seconds → only 1-2 saves total (not hundreds)
Two sessions with stale state → second save rejected with VERSION_CONFLICT
Conflict resolution: reload backend state and notify user
backendChanges: Add version column to canvas_tab_states table

contracts.title: Data import/export
contracts.description: Export project as .zhimengji (zip: project.json + markdown files). Import: .zhimengji or plain Markdown directory. Bookshelf entry points for both operations.

export: User clicks Export in Bookshelf card menu
Tauri save dialog picks output path
Backend reads all project data from SQLite
Backend assembles zip: project.json (metadata + objects + connections + canvas states) + per-object .md files
On success: show toast with object/connection counts
import: Tauri open dialog picks .zhimengji or directory
If .zhimengji: unzip, parse project.json, upsert into SQLite
If directory: scan .md files, create objects from filenames and content
On success: show imported project on bookshelf

errorReturns.IO_ERROR: toast with error details, no state change

acceptance: Export contains all objects, connections, canvas states
Re-import exported .zhimengji creates identical project
Markdown import recognizes # title as object name, [[WikiLink]] as references
backendChanges: Add export_project and import_project functions in db.rs
Add commands in commands.rs, register in lib.rs

contracts.title: Creation wizard (new project flow)
contracts.backendDependency: P0-05 export/import not needed for this contract
contracts.description: Replace one-click 'new project' with two-step wizard: (1) title + genre, (2) optional template. Quick-create bypass with Ctrl+click. Genre influences initial gradient and template suggestions.

creationWizard: User clicks '新建作品' → CreationWizard modal opens
Step 1: enter title, select genre (dropdown with preview gradient)
Step 2: select template (blank / three-act / character-driven / world-first) — optional
User clicks '开始创作' → api.createProject() + navigate to editor
If template selected: create preset objects via api.createWorldObject()
If Ctrl+click: skip wizard, create with last-used genre

errorReturns.api_failure: toast: '创建失败', modal stays open

acceptance: New user can start creating within 3 clicks (including title input)
Ctrl+click creates project immediately with default/last genre
Genre selection updates gradient preview in real-time
Template creates correct preset objects

contracts.title: First-launch tutorial
contracts.description: 3-step lightbox overlay on first entry per project. Covers: object types, WikiLinks, canvas. Skip button always visible. '?' help button in sidebar reopens guide. Empty-state guide cards.

firstLaunch: User enters project for first time → check localStorage flag
If no flag: show FirstLaunchGuide 3-step overlay
Step 1: '这里有8种对象类型' + example card
Step 2: '在文档中写入 [[对象名]]' + interactive demo
Step 3: '画板可以可视化你的世界结构' + screenshot
User clicks '开始使用' → dismiss, set localStorage flag

acceptance: First-time user completes guide → can create object and WikiLink
Guide skipped → no functional impact
Guide only shows once per project

contracts.title: Markdown-first storage
contracts.backendDependency: none (content field already stores string, no schema change)
contracts.description: Switch storage format from HTML to Markdown. TipTap renders Markdown via @tiptap/extension-markdown. Source mode shows raw Markdown (canonical). WYSIWYG mode demoted to optional. Auto-migrate existing HTML content on first load.

markdownEdit: User types in editor → content stored as Markdown
WYSIWYG: TipTap converts Markdown→ProseMirror→HTML for display
onUpdate: TipTap serializes to Markdown, updates WorldObject.content
Source mode: shows content directly (raw Markdown)
Preview mode: renders Markdown→HTML for reading
Existing HTML on first object load: convert HTML→Markdown via turndown

errorReturns.conversion_failure: keep original content, show toast: '格式转换失败，内容保持不变'

acceptance: Source mode shows Markdown, not HTML
Edit Markdown in source → switch to WYSIWYG → format preserved
Existing HTML content auto-migrated to Markdown on first load

contracts.title: Unified toolbar
contracts.description: Single toolbar that adapts to editing mode. WYSIWYG: active button highlighting. Source: inserts Markdown syntax. Mode switch button integrated into toolbar right side. No UI flicker on mode switch.

toolbarBehavior.wysiwyg: Buttons call editor.chain().toggleXxx().run(); 'active' class when format is active
toolbarBehavior.source: Buttons insert Markdown prefix/suffix at cursor; no active state
toolbarBehavior.modeSwitch: Single button group [编辑 | 预览] on toolbar right side. Transition without content re-render flicker.

acceptance: Same toolbar in both WYSIWYG and source modes — just different button behavior
No flicker when switching between modes
Mode switch button always visible in toolbar right side

contracts.title: Save status indicator
contracts.description: Bottom status bar left side shows save status. Green=saved, yellow=saving, red=failed, gray=offline. Driven by contentDirty flag and SyncManager events. 500ms debounce auto-save. Click-to-retry on failure.

saveIndicator.statusBar: Left side: colored dot + label; right side: word count

acceptance: User always sees current save state in status bar
Failed save shows red indicator with click-to-retry

contracts.title: Canvas zoom controls
contracts.description: Floating panel bottom-right: +/- buttons (25% step), percentage display, 'fit canvas', '100%' button. Range 0.2x-3.0x. Ctrl+wheel / Ctrl++ / Ctrl+-. Zoom anchors to mouse position.

zoom.fit_canvas: calculate bounding box of all nodes, set scale to fit

acceptance: Zoom controls visible and functional in canvas view
Ctrl+wheel zooms smoothly with mouse position anchor
Fit canvas ensures all nodes visible
Scale persists with 500ms debounce (P0-04)

contracts.title: Canon system guide
contracts.description: After 3rd object: popup suggesting canon inclusion. Info icon next to canon button shows 4-level explanation. Canon set header shows explanatory line.

canonGuide: count >= 3 and not dismissed → show CanonGuideCard popup
Popup explains 4 canon levels with color-coded examples
'不再显示' checkbox sets localStorage flag
Inspector '收录为设定' button gets info icon with hover tooltip

acceptance: After creating 3 objects, user sees canon guide popup
User can explain 4 canon levels after seeing guide
Guide suppressible with '不再显示'

contracts.title: Global search
contracts.description: Ctrl+K/Cmd+K search in navbar. Search scope: object name, content, tags, aliases. Results grouped by type. Fuzzy + pinyin support (pinyin-pro). 300ms response target.

globalSearch: User presses Ctrl+K → GlobalSearch modal opens
Input debounce 150ms: filter objects by query
Search name (exact + fuzzy) → content (includes) → tags (includes) → aliases (fuzzy)
Results grouped by ObjectType (人物/地点/组织…)
Pinyin support: 'lisi' matches '李四' via pinyin-pro library
Click result → navigate to object document

errorReturns.no_results: 显示 '无匹配结果' with suggestions
errorReturns.api_unavailable: offline mode still searches local state

acceptance: Ctrl+K opens search within 100ms
Search results appear within 300ms of input
Fuzzy and pinyin search work
Click result navigates to correct object

select.description: Click to select, click background to deselect

addConnection.description: Click source node, drag to target, select type

frontendBackendHandoff.note: SyncManager is the single routing layer for all writes. Components never call api.* directly.

handoffPoints.where: App.tsx → SyncManager → tauri-api → Tauri invoke → commands.rs → db.rs
App.tsx → SyncManager ping → tauri-api → Tauri invoke
App.tsx → tauri-api directly → Tauri invoke → commands.rs → db.rs
Bookshelf button → Tauri dialog → commands.rs → db.rs → zip/unzip

P0-01: 重试3次后显示错误提示
重启应用后队列不丢失
P0-03: 删除对象可通过撤销恢复
关闭应用后撤销历史不保留
P0-04: 版本戳冲突有明确提示
P1-02: 引导后知道如何创建对象和链接
P1-05: 用户始终可见保存状态
